cause_analysis.narrative: LuvTeeNails & Beauty Co. churned on 2026-03-11 after 180 days with Zoca. On 2025-12-23 they mentioned an alternative provider ("going with"). Classification: competitive switch. The client mentioned an alternative provider before cancelling.
recommendations: [Competitive] Client mentioned a competitor on 2025-12-23 — log this to Product + Sales for competitive positioning work.

Hi Kanak, I’m reaching out to request a few strategic updates to my Zoca site and automated lead flow so it better supports direct bookings and reduces low-intent inquiries.  After reviewing my current setup and lead behavior, I’d like to simplify the experience and make the booking path more action-oriented. Below is …

2. Booking Expectation Notice   Near the booking entry point, I’d like to include this notice to reduce abandoned inquiries and confusion:  ⚠️ Submitting a request does not reserve an appointment.   Availability is first-come, first-booked through the online calendar.

4.  Promotion Placement   To avoid booking friction, I’d like to feature only one limited-time promotion on the Zoca site.  Please keep the Valentine’s Duo Experience as the sole promo displayed, positioned after the services section and before reviews.   Other seasonal promotions (such as bundle deals) will be markete…

Overall, the goal of these updates is to: - Reduce low-intent inquiries   - Eliminate unnecessary back-and-forth messaging   - Direct clients straight to the booking calendar   - Better reflect a private, appointment-only studio experience    Please let me know which of these updates you’re able to implement on your en…

1. Homepage / Hero Section Copy   Please update the main description on my Zoca site to the following:  Luxury Nail & Lash Services in Newnan, GA   A private beauty studio specializing in structured nail enhancements, long-lasting gel systems, and curated lash services.   Appointments are limited and available by onlin…

3. Automated Lead Text Message   I’d like to replace the current automated message that asks if I should send appointment options.  Please update the automated message to:  > Hi {{first_name}}, this is Tierra from LuvTeeNails & Beauty Co. 🤍   > I saw your booking request come through.   >   > To secure an appointment, …
